ownerDecision: Use latest stable ecosystem-compatible dependency graph; use Microsoft official TypeScript 6 compatibility package for API-dependent Vue tooling while retaining native TypeScript 7 side-by-side; do not patch, bypass, or weaken Vue SFC typecheck.
previousBlocker: vue-tsc@3.3.7 failed with typescript@7.0.2 because TypeScript 7 does not export typescript/lib/tsc.

facts: TypeScript 7.0 does not ship with a stable API; TypeScript 7.1 is expected to ship a new and different API.
Microsoft published @typescript/typescript6 as a 6.0/7.0 transition compatibility package.
@typescript/typescript6 provides tsc6, re-exports the TypeScript 6 API, and is recommended through npm aliases for tools importing typescript directly.

Microsoft states workflows using Vue, MDX, Astro, Svelte, and similar tools likely cannot yet leverage TypeScript 7 because TypeScript 7 lacks a stable programmatic API and Volar-like tools can currently rely only on TypeScript 6.0.

compilerRoles.typescript: Package name expected by vue-tsc; official TypeScript 6 compatibility API package; currently blocked by shim handling in @volar/typescript.
compilerRoles.typescript-7: Native TypeScript 7 compiler retained side-by-side; validated only by CLI identity smoke in P0 because it cannot validate Vue templates without stable programmatic integration.

dependencyPolicyCorrection: Independent latest package maxima are superseded by latest stable ecosystem-compatible graph selection. Exceptions require upstream evidence, owner, review trigger, and removal condition.

evidence: vue-tsc --version fails on Volar shim handling

blocker.summary: The official Microsoft @typescript/typescript6 compatibility package exists and is installed under the package name expected by vue-tsc, but vue-tsc@3.3.7 through @volar/typescript@2.4.28 fails against the compatibility package tsc shim with Failed to locate tsc module path from shim.
blocker.failingError: Error: Failed to locate tsc module path from shim at @volar/typescript/lib/quickstart/runTsc.js:39:27
causeEvidence: @volar/typescript@2.4.28 runTsc supports a shim regex only for module.exports = require("./<word>.js") and throws when that regex does not match.
No application source change, node_modules edit, package export patch, custom wrapper, or vue-tsc bypass is permitted by P0C.

productionBuild.evidence: Fails at vue-tsc with Failed to locate tsc module path from shim before Vite build.

browserSmokeValidation.reason: Authoritative typecheck and production build failed; PASS is forbidden when browser smoke is not run.

commands: for f in docs/migration/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
for f in .ai/reports/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
jsonValidation.evidence: All migration JSON and report JSON files parsed successfully after P0C updates.

reactRuntimeAudit.evidence: Search found no forbidden runtime dependency. Only false positives were @vue/reactivity and @vitest/mocker.

mockDataAudit.evidence: Search found no mock/fake/fixture product runtime. Only false positives were @vitest/mocker.

featureImplementationAudit.evidence: No application source, feature, view, Router, Pinia, token, asset, API, or persistence file was modified. Search hits were Vitest internals only.

sourceIntegrityLimitations: No Git commands were allowed. Source integrity is limited to no source-targeted writes and root metadata evidence.
upstreamReviewTriggers: @typescript/typescript6 publishes a non-shim tsc path or compatible shim
vue-tsc releases stable TypeScript 7 programmatic integration
TypeScript 7.1+ releases stable API support required by Vue Language Tools
bridgeRemovalConditions: stable Vue Language Tools support is released
vue-tsc no longer requires TypeScript 6 compatibility API
complete repository typecheck passes on TypeScript 7
warnings: Official @typescript/typescript6 package uses an internal @typescript/old dependency that reports TypeScript 6.0.3 through require("typescript").version and tsc6 --version.
Browser smoke was not run because typecheck/build failed.
pnpm-workspace.yaml remains only for pnpm 11 allowBuilds.vue-demi policy.
